# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservice-a
  labels:
    app: my-microservice-a
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservice-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-microservice-a
          image: your-repo/my-microservice-a:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "100m"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservice-b
  labels:
    app: my-microservice-b
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservice-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-microservice-b
          image: your-repo/my-microservice-b:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "100m"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-microservice-c
  labels:
    app: my-microservice-c
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservice-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-microservice-c
      annotations:
        # Example of omitting the annotation, relying on namespace-level default
        # If the namespace is labeled 'istio-injection=enabled', sidecar will be injected.
        # If the namespace is labeled 'istio-injection=disabled' or no label, sidecar will NOT be injected
        # unless this annotation explicitly sets "true".
        # This example assumes the namespace defaults to injection. If not, sidecar will not be injected.
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-microservice-c
          image: your-repo/my-microservice-c:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "100m"
